actions.script:
String requestedReport = (report ?: documentType ?: 'requisicion').toString() if (requestedReport == 'requisition') requestedReport = 'requisicion' if (requestedReport in ['finished', 'finishedProduct', 'producto']) requestedReport = 'productoTerminado'
String serviceName switch (requestedReport) { case 'orden': serviceName = 'sv.localization.ManufacturingSvServices.render#OrdenProduccionPdf' break case 'productoTerminado': serviceName = 'sv.localization.ManufacturingSvServices.render#ProductoTerminadoPdf' break case 'costeo': serviceName = 'sv.localization.ManufacturingSvServices.render#HojaCierre' break case 'requisicion': default: serviceName = 'sv.localization.ManufacturingSvServices.render#HojaRequisicionPdf' break } Map rr = ec.service.sync().name(serviceName).parameters([workEffortId: workEffortId]).call() if (!rr?.rendered || !rr?.pdfBytes) { ec.web.response.sendError(500, rr?.message ?: 'Error renderizando PDF de produccion') return } ec.web.response.setContentType(rr.contentType ?: 'application/pdf') ec.web.response.setHeader('Content-Disposition', "inline; filename=\"${rr.filename ?: "produccion-${workEffortId}.pdf"}\"") ec.web.response.setContentLength(((byte[]) rr.pdfBytes).length) ec.web.response.outputStream.write((byte[]) rr.pdfBytes)

String encWorkEffortId = java.net.URLEncoder.encode(workEffortId.toString(), 'UTF-8') String encReport = java.net.URLEncoder.encode((report ?: documentType ?: 'requisicion').toString(), 'UTF-8') sri.sendRedirectAndStopRender("download?workEffortId=${encWorkEffortId}&report=${encReport}")
